headings.usage: Use for all H1-H4, tight letter spacing (tracking-tight or tracking-tighter), leading-none for H1.

body.usage: Use for standard paragraphs, loose line height (leading-relaxed).

data_numbers.usage: Use exclusively for the calculator inputs, outputs, data metrics, and ROI figures to give an engineering feel.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous padding for marketing sections (p-12, py-24, gap-12). For calculators, use dense padding (p-4, gap-4).

grids.marketing: MODE A: TETRIS GRID - Asymmetrical grids (grid-cols-12), wide gaps (gap-8 to gap-12).
grids.calculators: MODE B: CONTROL ROOM GRID - Dense, strict data correlation grids (grid-cols-4), tight gaps (gap-4).

layout_and_spacing.containers: Sections should NOT use typical Bootstrap-style containers. Use full-width sections with max-w-7xl content wrappers.

components_strategy.marketing_sections: Pure HTML/Tailwind. Use overlapping div layers. Hero overlay max bg-black/40.
components_strategy.calculators: Shadcn/UI heavily customized. Matte finishes (no soft shadows), 1px solid borders (border-[#D8D3CC]), flat solid backgrounds.
components_strategy.buttons: Square or very slightly rounded (rounded-sm), solid colors, high contrast text. Hover states must explicitly set text color and background.
components_strategy.cards: For marketing: Flat background, 1px border. For data widgets: Neumorphism (clay & crisp) - soft ambient shadow with sharp 1px inner border.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-md for cards. Fast background color transitions for buttons.
motion_and_interactions.entrance: Staggered fade-up for grid items. Use Framer Motion.

media_and_images.guidelines: Do NOT use overlays darker than bg-black/40. No placeholder images. Use provided URLs.

battery_generator.description: Technical close-up of battery backup for the Services/Generator section.

energy_map.description: Abstract topographical energy node map for the 'Service Area' or 'ROI' background.

roof_panels.description: Real solar roof installation for gallery or project showcase.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements, buttons, inputs, tabs, and calculator results MUST include 'data-testid' attributes (e.g. data-testid='calc-submit-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the marketing sections using standard HTML/Tailwind with large typography (Cabinet Grotesk) and organic overlaps.
Build the calculators (Solar Size, Battery Sizing, Mount Type, Generator, ROI) using Shadcn components (Inputs, Select, Tabs, Sliders) but style them with a 'Control Room' dense aesthetic.
Use JetBrains Mono for all numerical outputs in the calculators to emphasize the engineering tool feel.
Ensure the hero image uses the provided cinematic solar home URL with a max bg-black/40 overlay.
Never use generic placeholder images or text. Use the scraped company info and testimonials directly.
